name: City Armory
description: Come play pickleball at City Armory in Mitchell, SD! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Hitchcock Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Hitchcock Park Tennis Courts in Mitchell, SD! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: LB Williams Elementary
description: Come play pickleball at LB Williams Elementary in Mitchell, SD! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.
